heroSection.title: Move money like it should be — fast, simple, borderless.
heroSection.description: Clap is building the future of African money movement — helping people send, receive, and convert money across borders with speed and transparency.

conversionSection.title: Convert money instantly with real-time rates across Naira, Cedi, and CFA—so you always know exactly what you send and what arrives.
conversionSection.description: Convert your money with the best rates.

WaitListFormSection.title: Join the waitlist
WaitListFormSection.description: Be among the first to send money across Africa with real rates and zero hidden fees using Clap.

waitlist.title: You’re on the
waitlist.description: Thanks for joining the Clap waitlist. We’ll keep you updated and let you know as soon as early access is ready.

Footer.title: Follow our journey
Footer.description: Clap is building modern financial infrastructure for Africa — making cross-border money movement faster, simpler, and more transparent.
Footer.built: Built for Africa, designed for the world.

disclaimer.paragraph1: Clap Finance is a financial technology company, not a bank. Financial services are provided by licensed banking and financial partners in the jurisdictions where Clap operates.
disclaimer.paragraph2: Clap provides technology and infrastructure that enable users to send, receive, convert, and manage money digitally. Banking, payment, card, and remittance services may be offered through regulated third-party partners.
disclaimer.paragraph3: Funds held through partner financial institutions may be subject to the protections and limitations applicable under those institutions and local regulations.
disclaimer.paragraph4: Certain services may not be available in all regions and may be subject to eligibility requirements, transaction limits, and regulatory approvals.
disclaimer.paragraph5: All trademarks, logos, and brand names are the property of their respective owners.
